Nora
Home Team Nora AI Legal Dashboard

Transparency & Trust

Last Updated: March 17, 2026

Terms of Service
Privacy Policy

Terms of Service

1. Agreement to Terms

By inviting, installing, or using Nora within a Discord server, you acknowledge that you have read and agreed to these Terms of Service. If you do not agree with these terms you must remove the bot from your server.

2. Relationship with Discord

Nora operates through the Discord platform and relies on the Discord API. Users must comply with Discord's Terms of Service and Community Guidelines.

3. Description of the Service

Nora is a community moderation and management tool designed for Discord servers. The service provides configurable tools for automated moderation and interaction.

4. Moderation Responsibility

Nora provides automation tools but does not replace human moderation. Server administrators remain fully responsible for moderation decisions.

5. Command and Permission Usage

Nora operates using the permissions granted to it by server administrators. Commands may only execute actions that the bot has been granted permission to perform.

6. AI Assistance Features

Some Nora features include AI-generated responses. These systems are designed to assist moderators but are not guaranteed to be accurate in all situations.

7. Payments and Subscriptions

All payments for Nora premium features are handled exclusively through Discord's official subscription system. Nora does not directly process or store payment information.

Privacy Policy

1. Privacy-First Design

Nora is designed with privacy as a core principle. The system only processes the minimum data necessary for functionality.

2. Operational Data

The system may store limited operational information required to function, such as server identifiers and configuration settings.

3. Message Processing

Message content may be temporarily processed for moderation filters or AI context. This processing occurs in memory and is not permanently stored.

4. AI Data Handling

Nora does not use server data to train AI models. Any AI-related processing is performed for real-time functionality only.

5. Data Isolation

Each server's data is isolated. Data generated in one server is never shared with or visible to other servers.

6. Data Retention

Removing Nora from a server deletes configuration data associated with that server.
